content.en:
"The !!! of the Most Powerful Path"

True Yang and True River are a little unbelievable.

There are only a few in the Dual Dao Realm that can create a Supreme Dao Divine Power, and it takes endless years to create.

Like the True River Valley Lord and True Yang, they didn't create the Supreme Dao Divine Power, so Miao An created a Supreme Dao Divine Power.

But what about Elder Dongguang, it hasn't been long since he became the Supreme Dao Realm, how did he create the Supreme Dao Divine Power?

Why?

"The fate of Elder Dongguang is absolutely unimaginable!!!"

True Yang and True River Valley Lord's eyes were excited.

They thought that they would have the opportunity to obtain the Cave Light Elder, and they were afraid that they would be able to rise easily.

The triple to the Dao realm and the quadruple to the Dao realm are not necessarily the limit.

As soon as they thought of this, they wanted to kill Ye Tian even more quickly.

Time passed slowly.

Finally.

Ye Tian's true body copy body arrived.

This time, the real body is in a hurry, and there is also a risk of exposure, but fortunately, everything is safe.

Rumble!!!!!

The void was torn apart, and the domain barrier formed by the True River Diagram was directly torn apart.

Immediately after, Ye Tian walked in.

"Nine Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord ???"

The Lord of the True River Valley was stunned.

A mere Origin Upper Realm Overlord would dare to come to the rescue of Elder Dongguang?

But in the next second, he realized that something was wrong.

How could the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm tear apart the domain barrier formed by the three-pattern supreme dao weapon like the True River Diagram, ordinary double supreme realm can't do it!

At this time, True Yang went to deal with Ye Tian's true body copy body.

However, as soon as he fought, he was directly defeated.

Rumble!!!!

The light of the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique directly pierced through the two-pattern Supreme Dao armor on Zhenyang's body, nailing his body into the void, and his body gradually shattered.

With just one blow, it completely hit the true yang in the late stage of the Second Supreme Dao Realm, which was the invincible combat power of the Second Supreme Dao Realm.

"No!"

The Lord of the True River Valley tried to mobilize the True River Diagram to restrain Ye Tian and prevent Ye Tian from killing his son True Yang.

However, there is no use.

Tear !!

The power of the True River Diagram was shattered, and another shot penetrated.

Click!

True Yang died instantly.

At this moment, the True River Valley Lord burned all his strength and vowed to kill Ye Tian.

However, even if he burned all his strength, he was not Ye Tian's opponent.

Countless spears shattered everything, beating the True River Valley Lord's True River Diagram to pieces, and then forcibly smashed the True River Valley Lord's body into countless pieces, completely annihilating his vitality.

The gap in strength between them is too big, and all the actions of the True River Valley Lord are meaningless.

After killing the True River Valley Lord and True Yang, Ye Tian took the items on their bodies and quickly left.

This time, he didn't go to the True River Valley.

For him, there was no need to go to the True River Valley.

Regardless of whether or not the matter of his killing of the Lord of the True River Valley was exposed, he would not return to the True River Valley anytime soon.

Of course, he would still use his identity as an elder of the True River Valley to lead the Dao Great Array to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, and the Supreme Dao would completely lose this identity.

"Go back to the Taixuan Ancient Capital!"

Ye Tian returned.

However, he didn't catch up with the opening of the Guiding Array this time.

Of course, he will cultivate here for a period of time, waiting for the next opening.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian finally created a supreme path divine power again, which was perfected from the supreme dao flowing body technique, and he still named it the supreme dao flowing body technique.

The Supreme Dao Flowing Body Technique at the level of the Supreme Dao Divine Power was much faster than before, and it also made his strength increase by a large margin.

In the hundreds of thousands of supreme dao years that followed, he successively created some supreme dao supernatural powers, so that his strength gradually tended to a limit, and if he wanted to continue to improve, he could only let his true body break through to the first supreme dao realm.

Other than that.

He entered the Great Array again and again, and every time he was absent, this made him famous in the Taixuan Ancient Capital.

However, this is not a good reputation, but the reputation of a fat sheep.

There are quite a few supreme realms staring at him, and there are even triple supreme realms staring at him.

It can be said that once Ye Tian's Cave Light Replica Body goes out of the Taixuan Ancient Capital, he will definitely be killed.

But Ye Tian just didn't go out, with the Taisu Palace sitting in the Taixuan Ancient Capital, no one in the Supreme Dao Realm dared to cause trouble.

Before I knew it, another period of time had passed.

At this time, the Great Array of Guiding Dao was completely useless to him, and his Supreme Dao Rules were already strong to a certain extent.

......

Taixuan ancient capital, to the ancient monument of the rules of the road.

Ye Tian came here, and he was going to test his Supreme Dao Rule Realm.

Airplanes!!!!!

Ye Tian stood in the void inside the Ancient Monument of the Supreme Dao Rules, exuding the aura of the Supreme Dao Rules, and soon the test was over.

Ninth Sequence Ninety into Two

Seeing this Supreme Dao Rule Realm, Ye Tian seemed very calm and not too excited.

In the past, he didn't know the realm division of the Supreme Dao rules, but in fact, many Supreme Dao realms didn't know.

But by chance, he went to the Tao to divide the rules of the Dao.

It is said that the rules of the Supreme Path that they have now comprehended are only sequence branches.

For example, he comprehended the ninth sequence of supreme path rules, and only when the ninth sequence of supreme dao rules reached the tenth-level perfection realm, he could spy on the eighth sequence of supreme dao rules, otherwise he would not be able to see them at ordinary times.

Only when the realm is constantly improved can we see the truth of heaven and earth.

And the Eighth Sequence's Supreme Dao Rules far surpassed the Ninth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, but it was simply too difficult to break this shackle.

Like the Great Array of Introductions, the rules of the Supreme Path that are introduced are also the rules of the Supreme Path of the ninth sequence.

Therefore, it is impossible to comprehend the rules of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao in the Great Array of Initiation Paths.

Like Taisu Palace, there must be strong people who comprehend the rules of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao, but it is estimated that the weakest ones are all genius demons in the Quadruple Supreme Dao Realm.

As for whether there is a strong person who has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao Realm, even if there is, it may be a terrifying existence of the sixth or seventh Supreme Dao realm.

Ye Tian's current purpose is to raise the ninth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules to the tenth realm, and then comprehend the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, but he definitely can't do it at present.

"Next, let's break through to the First Rank Dao Realm, so that we can hope to get more good things!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He is still preparing to break through in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm to impact the Dao Realm, once the true body breaks through, his strength will skyrocket, and he can deal with the Xuanming Drum, a strange thing in the Dao.

Now, he also knows a little bit of the value of the Dao Strange Thing, in short, the value is extremely terrifying, but the strength is too strong.

Moreover, the supreme Dao strange things only exist in the strange land, and the supreme Dao strange things in the Xuanlin Valley of the Ninth Strange Land are the weakest, but there is also hope that they can be killed.
